MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
James P. Watson, Atty. for Plaintiff and moving party: Calportland Company
No appearances made by Defendant.

RULING: TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: PLAINTIFF CALPORTLAND COMPANY's Application For Writ Of Attachment is granted in the amount of $245,187.62. No opposition has been filed.
